title: int sqlite3VdbeExec(Vdbe *): Assertion `memIsValid(pCtx->argv[i])' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, description) VALUES (NULL, 'Test NULL'), (15.5, 'Valid Float'), (CAST('Invalid String' AS FLOAT), 'String Value'), (20, 'Another Valid Int');
CREATE TABLE related_table (ref_id INT, amount INT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT COALESCE(INSTR(CASE WHEN value IS NOT NULL THEN value ELSE (SELECT SUM(amount) FROM related_table) END, 15.5), 0) FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: SELECT with coalesce and instr on mixed data types
